hooks.command: sh -c 'BUN=$(command -v bun 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$BUN" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.bun/bin/bun" ] && BUN="$HOME/.bun/bin/bun"; [ -z "$BUN" ] && { echo "aidlc plugin compose: bun not found, skipping" >&2; exit 0; }; AIDLC_HARNESS_DIR=.claude "$BUN" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compose.ts"'
